name: 90'x20" Striped Table Runner Khaki/Black - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your dining room table with this Striped Table Runner from Threshold™. The rectangular table runner features a black stripe pattern on a khaki backdrop, adding a classic style you'll love. The 100% cotton table runner helps protect your surface against scratches, spills and messes. Pair with coordinating napkins and placemats to create a stylish dining setting.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
